text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 167 

MDCR_PD_AMT 

LABEL: Medicare Paid Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount paid by Medicare on this claim or adjustment. 

SHORT NAME: MDCR_PD_AMT 

LONG NAME: MDCR_PD_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76); may be negative. 
Null/missing = Source value is missing
